integrity.description: Check that the agent actually computed the entropy values using pandas/numpy.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Jupyter notebook should contain actual Python code calculating Shannon entropy and normalized entropy from the dataset, rather than just hardcoding the final arrays or values.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used the specified UrbanSim dataset.

integrity.description: Check that the output files were generated programmatically.
